ksa_text: Knowledge of comprehensive AI evaluation frameworks, including functional performance testing, behavioral testing, red-teaming, fairness evaluation, robustness testing, and safety evaluation.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to Model Risk Manager scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("robustness.{0,15} ?:test|assess"). STRM composite is strong (0.5136); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.
